name: firehydrant
description: Reads broad FireHydrant REST API resources and exposes direct JSON/no-body FireHydrant mutations through declarative write actions.

risk.read: external FireHydrant API reads across incidents, catalog, alerts, teams, runbooks, metrics, integrations, and configuration resources
risk.write: creates, updates, archives, deletes, triggers, and otherwise mutates FireHydrant resources through documented JSON/no-body REST endpoints
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token before execution
